generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA director, I've seen firsthand how critical civil defense preparedness is for national security. The current administration's cuts put us all at risk. We need robust local readiness programs - they're not just about emergencies, they're about deterrence. Trust me, I've coordinated responses to everything from cyberattacks to natural disasters. Our allies are investing heavily in this - shouldn't we? #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
